utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully specified: property includes details, type, price, size, location, and description; financing includes solution, down payment, fees, interest rate, term, and currency; legal_services includes name, cost, and currency; moving_services includes name, cost, and currency; setup_services includes utility package type, cost, currency, included services, and inspection service details; total_budget includes full breakdown of all costs and grand total. Thus all 6 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property described as a 'modern development, smart home, energy efficient' apartment priced at CAD 480,000 and 95 sqm in Toronto Business District. In the ground-truth ratings, the 'New Build' purchase property matches this description exactly (price 480K, 95 sqm, eco-friendly, smart home). Thus, the property corresponds to 'New Build' with a rating of 10. The financing solution is a 'mortgage' with 10% down payment and processing fee of 800 CAD. In the ground truth, this matches the 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage option (down payment 10%, fee 800 CAD) with a rating of 10. The legal service chosen is 'Basic Legal Package' costing 800 CAD, which has a rating of 9. The moving service selected is 'Basic Moving Services' costing 150 CAD, which matches 'Self-Move' (the only one at 150 CAD) with a rating of 6. The utility setup is 'basic' costing 120 CAD, corresponding to 'Basic Utilities' with a rating of 6. The inspection service within setup is 'New Build Inspection' costing 400 CAD, which has a rating of 7.
